name: io.github.yokingma/one-search-mcp
description: Web search, crawl, scrape & extract with agent-browser, SearXNG, Tavily, DuckDuckGo, Bing & more

environmentVariables.description: Search provider to use (searxng, duckduckgo, bing, tavily, google, zhipu, exa, bocha, local)
environmentVariables.name: SEARCH_PROVIDER

environmentVariables.description: API URL for SearXNG (required if using searxng provider), or Google Custom Search Engine ID for google
environmentVariables.name: SEARCH_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: API key for search provider (required for tavily, bing, google, zhipu, exa, bocha)
environmentVariables.name: SEARCH_API_KEY
